ec2.ec2fleet.acceleratortotalmemorymibre: The minimum and maximum amount of total accelerator memory, in MiB.

ec2.ec2fleet.acceleratortotalmemorymibre.Description: The maximum amount of accelerator memory, in MiB. To specify no maximum limit, omit this parameter.
The minimum amount of accelerator memory, in MiB. To specify no minimum limit, omit this parameter.
